timeline.title: Mini Bio-Digester
timeline.description: Built as Form 2 student at Dedza Secondary School. First engineering project that sparked my curiosity in applied problem-solving and sustainable technology.
timeline.details: Designed and constructed a working anaerobic digester using PVC pipes and drums. Demonstrated methane capture for cooking. Won 1st place at Dedza District Science Fair.

timeline.title: Avocado Oil Extraction
timeline.description: Experimental project exploring agricultural processing and value addition. Learned about chemical extraction methods and sustainable production.
timeline.details: Investigated cold-press and solvent extraction methods for avocado oil. Analyzed yield percentages and quality factors. Developed business model for small-scale production.

timeline.title: Teaching & Mentorship Begins
timeline.description: Started journey as Student Teacher at Bright Future Private Secondary School, teaching Mathematics and Physics.
timeline.details: Began 1.5 year journey teaching Form 3 and 4 students. Developed simplified teaching aids and peer-learning methodologies.

timeline.title: CheckMySmile Launch
timeline.description: Founded and built dental awareness & smile-tracking platform. First version launched with 50 beta users.
timeline.details: Built with Python Flask and SQLite. Features include daily smile tracking, educational content, and dental clinic referrals. Reached 100+ active users within 6 months.

timeline.title: KUHES Innovations Coordinator
timeline.description: Appointed as KUHES Science For All Innovations Coordinator, leading student innovation initiatives.
timeline.details: Developed framework for identifying and nurturing student innovators. Organized first Innovation Sprint with 50+ participants. Secured departmental funding for prototyping.

timeline.title: QuantumResolve Technologies
timeline.description: Joined as Data Privacy & Compliance Lead, developing frameworks for healthcare data protection.
timeline.details: Developing privacy frameworks for healthcare data. Ensuring GDPR and local compliance. Leading ethical AI review board.

timeline.title: KUHES Campus Connect
timeline.description: Started development of exclusive student networking platform using institutional emails.
timeline.details: Building with Django and PostgreSQL. Features include verified profiles, project matchmaking, and resource sharing. Beta launch planned for Q3 2025.

timeline.title: Data Analyst Transformation
timeline.description: Began intensive 3-month self-structured program in data analytics with healthcare focus.
timeline.details: Structured curriculum covering Python, pandas, visualization, and statistics. Completed projects on malaria incidence and dental clinic optimization.

timeline.title: Healing Journal Milestone
timeline.description: Reached 20+ pages in handwritten personal transformation journal.
timeline.details: Documented spiritual growth, discipline tracking, and emotional intelligence development. Practice of weekly handwriting for clarity and reflection.

milestones.description: Won Dedza District Science Fair for Mini Bio-Digester
Started teaching Mathematics at Bright Future Private Secondary School
Joined QuantumResolve as Data Privacy Lead
